notes: 3.10.32 — DINH GIA NHIEN LIEU THEO FIFO (Sep chot, sua loi kiem toan F-FUEL-1). Truoc day eventConsumptionValue dinh gia TOAN BO tieu thu theo gia BOM, bo ton dau -> sai (doan khong bom ra 0 USD). Nay FIFO: tieu thu rut TON DAU truoc (gia fuelStart.unitPrice), het moi rut BOM (gia fuelPumped.price); ton cuoi = phan bom con lai. Phan VUOT (tieu thu > ton dau+bom, do nhap lech): KHONG tu doan gia — hien canh bao ⚠ tren bang doan (khong lap bang gia doan). Ham thuan _fifoFuelValue + _fuelUnitPriceUsdPerL (xu ly VND/phuy/m3) tach de test (9 case pass, khop vi du Sep duyet: ton dau 1000@0.8+bom 500@1.0 tieu thu 1200 = 1000 USD). eventConsumptionValue giu chu ky cu (tra so USD) -> 5 cho goi khong doi; them eventConsumptionValueDetail tra {valueUsd,warnShort,shortL}. Anh huong: chi phi nhien lieu trong BCQT + bang doan phan anh dung gia thuc. Rollback = 3.10.31. Van tach khoi dot kiem toan F1-F3 (nhanh 3.10.29).
